name: Komi Republic (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the splendour and spaciousness of the northern sky
nature, its bounty, and the taiga
the colour of snow, the purity of nature in the north, simplicity and austerity, and Komi as a northern country

description: A horizontal tricolour of medium blue, green, and white in equal stripes.
history: Introduced on 27 November 1991 by resolution of the Plenum of the Supreme Court of the Komi SSR; finally enacted by the Law on the State Flag of the Komi Republic on 6 June 1994. Proportions changed from 1:2 to 2:3 by amendment on 17 December 1997.
